sourcePatterns.description: Detects legitimate Microsoft CIAM/Entra ID infrastructure markers (ConvergedError page with AADSTS codes and msauth CDN references) to reduce false positives

sourcePatterns.patternString: Go Daddy Website Builder[^"]*"[\s\S]*?(licensed[\s\S]{0,30}trust company|bank exams|cybersecurity audits|regulated exchange)
